name: Pomegranate
description: Naturally ripened on the vine. Rich in antioxidants, vibrant red, and incredibly juicy. Grown without any chemicals in the Anantapur soil.

name: Mosambi (Sweet Lime)
description: Sun-kissed, sweet, and refreshing. Perfect for juicing. Hand-picked at peak ripeness for maximum vitamin C and natural sweetness.

name: Groundnuts
description: Crunchy, protein-rich, and freshly harvested. Our groundnuts are sun-dried naturally — no added oils, preservatives, or moisture.

name: Bengal Gram
description: Organically grown chana from our fields. High in fibre, protein, and essential minerals. A kitchen staple from farm to your dal.
